paymentconfirmationtemplate:
Thank you for placing an order with XYZ.

We are currently in the process of fulfilling your order. XYZ ships Monday through Friday 8 AM to 6 PM PST. Orders placed on business days after 11:00 AM or in the weekend will be processed the next business day. If the product ordered is in stock and all billing information is verified with your credit card company, we will ship the product in the next 24 hours.

As soon as we ship your product, we will also send you an email confirming shipment along with the details of the shipping carrier and tracking number.

ORDER DETAILS
[%PAYMENTDETAILS%]


If you have any questions, please contact us at sales@XYZ.com
